_note: Daily Log of actions taken on the MWC GHL transformation. To add a new record, append an object to "entries": { "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "time": "optional string kept as given", "actor": "Eric | Computer | Claude Code | Vendor | System", "category": "extraction | spec | build | audit | incident | decision | deploy | investigation", "summary": "what happened", "ref": "optional commit sha, GHL id, or file path" }. The page groups entries by date and sorts newest first, so order here does not matter. Keep raw commit shas and GHL ids in ref where you have them.

entries.summary: Field inventory snapshot captured (generated_at in data.json): 128 fields listed, 14 real Opportunity custom fields present.
Brand-voice rules applied across all 74 to-be messages; New/Renewal consult dimension; Same Day/Come-back close tags; custom-fields library redesign.
Last production deploy of plan-workspace before the July rebuild cycle (Eric and Computer).
PR #1 opened (Keeps staging clone). Still open.
Revenue-integrity monitor GitHub Action reached scheduled self-stop; last snapshot commit recorded; monitor-data branch preview failures on Vercel end.
Session pickup; diagnosed 2 weeks of Vercel preview failures as monitor-data branch builds; committed vercel.json deployment-disable to monitor-data.
As-is workflow diagrams v1 built and paired side-by-side with to-be; deployed.
Course correction: separate as-is and to-be diagram surfaces; plan approved.
Detailed as-is explorer plus per-workflow detail pages from all recoverable repo data; monitor.yml patched to persist vercel.json.
Fresh GHL JWT provided; scope directive: Current State = ONLY the Active Workflows folder.
Live-account extraction: 28 active workflows, full step graphs (1,328 steps), 83 triggers, verbatim SMS/email bodies, via backend API plus Firebase fileUrl downloads.
Current State re-scoped to the 28 active workflows at 100% fidelity; deployed.
Per-workflow As-Is Workflow Flows page: 28 full-fidelity Mermaid diagrams.
As-is master interconnection map derived 100% from step graphs: 17 of 28 workflows wired by 28 connections, 11 isolated.
To-be plan review: readability, GHL best-practice validation (cited research), coverage matrix, prompt audit. Verdict: strategically sound, not yet executable; 6 P0 blockers.

Four decisions locked: PCC Sales Form triggers WF-05 (sole writer); IVR gets a to-be home while Price Calculator, Intake Reminder, and Vercel webhook retire; assume-consent for 11,077 historical contacts (accepted risk); 7 clean business days cutover gate.

Vendor sandbox extracted (90 unique workflows); conformance diff harness built; vendor verdict: not acceptable, 3 built / 5 built wrong / 8 missing, 13 blockers including contact-level "Sold" branching and per-location clones.
All review fixes plus decisions applied across plan surfaces; canonical WF-01..16 renumbering; 13 execution prompts; quiet hours everywhere.
ghl-development custom skill created (Eric and Computer): naming standards (no default action names), OO templatization rules, compliance defaults, API playbook.
Decision 12: class booking calendars replace service calendars; amended to one per clinic, 60-min slots, 6 seats, seat display off.
Direction: strip execution phase; app becomes pure current-state-vs-target spec.
Target pressure test: 3 blockers (two-vocabulary enum break, contradictory field models, missing appt_status gate), 12 majors.
Telemed section removed from app.

Write-path pilot: POST /workflow/{loc} creates drafts (proven), PUT updates metadata with version field (proven); step-graph save mechanism unknown at that point. Pilot draft created in sandbox -Target Deployment folder.

All 28 pressure-test findings fixed: canonical enum contract (sold|nosale|mut|mar), 35-field single opportunity model, WF-05 appt_status gating, attribution-at-create, renewal_date on every Won, idempotency stamp.
Claude Code handoff brief written (local build recommended); MCP server capabilities documented (no workflow write support).
Local repo merge incident (Eric and Claude Code): 8 local-only commits (PCC form mobile-first redesign, Guide mode) discarded by hard reset to origin/main; recoverable via reflog for about 30 days.
Sidebar icons made consistent per nav group.
35 new Opportunity custom fields created in live account per canonical model.

PCC Sales Data tab layout confirmed live on Opportunity record; direction: no separate GHL Form needed, PCCs edit the Opportunity directly; /pcc-form to be reframed as real-screenshot plus conditional-logic overlay.

Phase 3-4: workflow write endpoint fully reverse-engineered (PUT full-object read-modify-write with createdSteps/modifiedSteps/deletedSteps arrays; ~14 node type shapes verified from live workflows). New pipeline "Sales - Lead to Close" created live (Vt8cPz51C3i87moo73gQ, 11 stages). Blank WF-01 draft created in -Target Deployment folder (9163af32-a9e1-4a3b-beac-553c22125bb8). Blocked: trigger-write endpoint unknown; UI trigger add failed via automation. Cleanup pending: ZZ-TEST published scratch workflow plus duplicate blank draft.
Requested this Daily Log module.

Decision 13 locked: MWC stays on a single GHL sub-account with location as a per-record variable (Architecture A), not one sub-account per clinic, because pooled contact-center operations and shared lead flow require cross-clinic visibility. Commits the build to parameterized (never cloned) workflows and a Locations Custom Object for per-clinic data.

Decision 14 locked: per-clinic data lives in a Locations Custom Object (one record per clinic), stamped into generic operational contact fields by WF-01 at capture; templates reference only generic fields. Wave 0 addendum required: create the object + 3 records, add generic current_* fields, and reconcile already-executed Wave 0 custom values for per-clinic collisions.

Decision 14 executed against the live account: Locations Custom Object created with 6 fields; Richmond, Virginia Beach, and Newport News records seeded with real address/phone/hours/booking data; 4 generic operational contact fields created (current_clinic_*); contact-to-Home-Clinic association defined (contact_clinic). All additive; nothing deleted or published.

Full workflow-build pipeline proven end-to-end on the live account: all 16 WF-01..16 built as inactive drafts in -Target Release (messaging spines at full fidelity), plus the last hard node types solved: trigger-write (POST /workflow/{loc}/trigger), step-save envelope (full doc + templates + diff arrays + version), and if_else branching validated against real opportunity field IDs (WF-05 appt_status gate). Everything draft, zero active triggers, nothing fires. Data-node enrichment (opportunity writes, webhooks, full branch trees) is the remaining pass.

Decision 15 locked: message bodies live in GHL's native Template library (one template per message), referenced by workflow send-steps rather than inline, so copy is centralized and swappable without touching workflows. Personalization stays via merge fields; a Messages Custom Object is the fallback only if A/B variants are needed later.

Pipeline reconciliation note (not a defect -- expected pre-go-live state): live revenue currently runs through '01. MWC Sales Production' (uUm5DInIjq6uYlg9HDwU, 1,079 opportunities), while all -Target Release workflows are built against the new canonical pipeline 'Sales - Lead to Close' (Vt8cPz51C3i87moo73gQ, 0 opportunities -- expected, since it is not live yet). Account has 18 total pipelines; several pre-existing ones (02/03/04 per-clinic, MWC Lead Pipeline, PCC Referrals, Referral Rewards, Retention, No Show/Cancel, z Call Disposition) may still be in active use. OPEN DECISION for the go-live pass: does cutover migrate open opportunities from '01. MWC Sales Production' into 'Sales - Lead to Close' (and retire the old pipeline), or does the new pipeline only capture leads going forward from cutover while old-pipeline opportunities finish out their lifecycle in place? Also note the stage models differ: '01. MWC Sales Production' has 8 stages (Pending New/Renewal Arrival, New Sale, Renewal Sale, A&D/No Sale, No-Show, Rescheduled, Cancelled) vs. the 11-stage model (New Lead...Won) the spec and build_ids.json assume. Not a blocker for continued drafting; must be resolved before triggers are attached at go-live.

Decision 16 locked + executed the 2-surface templatization: created 6 brand Custom Values (footer, tagline, consult_descriptor, intake/survey/referral links — 3 links flagged placeholder-fill-before-go-live), created current_review_link contact field (id 7Pos1K79nIr21Or8xnHu), built 15 reconciled message-template payloads (sms_wf01..wf16 + email_wf01) with per-clinic token corrections (booking_link/review_link -> current_*), wrote message_registry into build_ids.json, and wrote scripts/create_templates.py (runnable with JWT) + scripts/validate_templates.py (PASSES: all tokens resolve). BLOCKED on backend JWT for: creating the 15 templates in GHL (PIT has read-only scope for templates, 401 on create) and wiring WF send-steps + WF-01 current_review_link stamp. All prep complete so creation is a one-command run once JWT is provided.

Created all 15 message templates live in the GHL Templates library (sms_wf01..wf16 + email_wf01), IDs saved to created_templates.json and registry updated to status created_draft. Read back sms_wf16/sms_wf06 confirming reconciled tokens round-tripped ({{contact.current_booking_url}}, {{contact.current_review_link}}, {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}, {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}). Templates are live records but NOT yet referenced by any workflow send-step (wiring is the remaining step). Still TODO: wire -Target Release draft send-steps to reference template IDs + add WF-01 current_review_link stamp step.

CRITICAL PLATFORM FINDING (probe-confirmed): GHL workflow SMS nodes cannot reference templates by ID. Saved templateId + messageTemplateId on a draft SMS node -> 200 OK, but read-back shows GHL stripped both; node retains only body+attachments. 0 of 54 live SMS nodes use a template reference. Implication: the 15 templates created this session are the canonical message library + drift-detection reference, NOT live runtime links. 'Wire send-steps to reference template IDs' (approved plan Step 4) is impossible for SMS. Substitute: copy each reconciled template body into the corresponding draft SMS node body (applies per-clinic token fixes + footer/descriptor templatization to the workflows). 19 of 44 draft SMS nodes currently hold unreconciled tokens. This substitute mutates -Target Release drafts, so it needs Eric's explicit go-ahead before proceeding. Validation script to be extended as a drift detector (template body vs workflow node body).

Vendor conformance review v2: extracted all 73 workflows (3,875 nodes) from the vendor's sandbox folder and diffed against the 16-workflow spec. Verdict: rebuild of the legacy sprawl, not an implementation of the spec -- 73 wfs vs 16, per-location clones (01B/C/D + 3x city nurtures + 6 JJ-prefixed + 3 Copy-), canonical contract absent (appt_status and sale_type appear NOWHERE; sale_outcome only in prose notes; no outcome_processed_at; renewal_date never written on Won), keystone 05 has two divergent copies (60 vs 44 nodes) with per-location branch trees and 10 create_opportunity nodes, 235 creates vs 17 updates (duplicate-opportunity pattern), 32 google_sheets steps as shadow data layer, 83 active triggers. Strengths worth porting: form-level gclid/fbclid/utm capture (01A-E), appointment-status transition plumbing (03x set), DNC/error hygiene, call-disposition pair, A&D objection tag segmentation. Recommendation: keep -Target Release as canonical, port the 2-3 good mechanics, hand vendor the punch list. Full extract in vendor_extract/ for reproducible verification.

Decision 17 locked: attribution upgrade. Two-touch model (first_*/last_* paired fields, write-once vs overwrite), frozen opportunity attribution stamp at create, closed-loop revenue conversions in WF-13 (Won with value, new vs renewal separated, event_id=opp ID dedup, enhanced conversions beyond the 90-day click window), showed as its own conversion event, phone-call attribution stamping in WF-12/16 with channel tracking numbers, and UTM governance (source enum + campaign convention + attr_needs_review tagging). Spec updated: 17 new fields in the model, 4 new guardrails, WF-01/12/13/16 build guides revised. Fields are PLANNED (verify-then-create) -- existing gclid_value/utm fields to be audited and mapped rather than duplicated.

Decision 17 fields implemented on the LIVE sub-account, additive-only: audited existing attribution fields first (contact utm_*/gclid_value/fbclid_value/source_url mapped as the last-touch living set; opportunity utm/gclid/fbclid mapped as the frozen last-touch stamp -- zero renames, zero duplicates), then created exactly the 10 missing fields: contact first_utm_source/first_utm_campaign/first_gclid/first_fbclid/first_landing_page/first_touch_at/last_touch_at + opportunity attr_first_utm_source/attr_first_utm_campaign/attr_landing_page. IDs in created_attribution_fields.json; complete role map in build_ids.json attribution_fields_d17. Server-side-only posture documented (no pixel required; native server actions + event_id dedup + hashed-identifier matching). No live workflow, pipeline, or existing field touched. Remaining: WF-01/12/13/16 draft-node wiring (needs JWT).

Port-mining pass over all 28 live production workflows (full node fidelity, ghl_extract). Decision 18 locked: 10 port items written into the WF-03/05/06/08/10/11/16 build guides + new WF-17 Price Calculator (canonical set now 17). Highest-value finds: find_opportunity multipath guard (fixes update-the-wrong-opportunity risk in WF-05/06/10), auto-confirm + remove_from_workflow recovery-exit (prevents booked members from getting recovery SMS -- a real member-experience bug in our current draft), reply-based confirm parsing, native business-hours condition (quarter_hour/day_week if_else -- also solves chat-widget OOO which the 16-set did not cover), complete IVR node shapes, and the price-calculator math_operation chain that feeds Won revenue to D17 conversions. 13 new node shapes captured into build_ids. NOTE: analysis based on the 28-workflow extract from this morning; if the linked folder contains workflows beyond those 28, a fresh JWT is needed to diff.

Decision 19 locked and folded into spec: JJ nurture designs adopted as branches (WF-07 five objection branches, WF-09 three temperature tiers) with the field-tested cadences and 78 brand-transformed JJ messages registered as template payloads (validation PASSES, 93 total). Rejected per-location gates (naming-bug clone drift found: newport_beach_booked), separate-workflow structure, and mid-nurture opportunity creation. Deployment to -Target Release drafts prepped (scripts/enrich_wf07_09.py) pending fresh JWT.
